items.briefing:
Global cyberattacks rose 17% in June compared to last year, according to Check Point research, meaning Australian organisations like yours face a higher-than-ever risk of being targeted. Microsoft has also patched a serious zero-day vulnerability called RoguePlanet, so if your devices haven't updated recently, now is a good time to check.

On a local note, OpenAI has launched ChatGPT Work in Australia, offering business-focused AI tools for workplaces. As AI becomes more common in daily work, staff should be cautious about what sensitive information they share with any AI platform.

**Practical tip:** Check that your Microsoft devices and software are fully updated today to protect against the recently patched RoguePlanet vulnerability.

featured.title: ACSC warns of large-scale campaign exploiting CMS vulnerabilities in Australia
featured.quote: ACSC warns of large-scale CMS vulnerability campaign actively targeting Australian organisations.
